      have : (-((P.n / p : ℤ))) ≥ (-((P.M : ℤ))) := by exact neg_le_neg this

    have : (P.initial.balance p : ℤ) ≥ -P.M := by
      exact le_trans hp' this
    simpa using this
  · have hprime : p.Prime := by
      have : (p : ℝ) > 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le (by
        have : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := Nat.cast_nonneg _
        have hn_pos : (0 : ℝ) < P.n := by
          have : 0 < P.n := lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.mul_pos P.hL_pos P.hL_pos) P.hL.le

        P.initial.balance p ≤ P.M := by

          by_contra hnp

            simp [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, Nat.factorization_eq_zero_of_not_prime _ hnp]
          have := Params.initial.balance_medium_prime_le (P := P) (p := p) hp'

        ⟩) ) hp'

have hp_large : p > P.n / P.L ∨ p ≤ P.n / P.L := lt_or_ge (P.n / P.L) p |> Or.symm
  have hp_le_n : p ≤ P.n := (hp.trans (Nat.div_le_self _ _))
  by_cases hprime : p.Prime
  · have hp_mem : p ∈ (P.n + 1).primesBelow := by
      refine mem_primesBelow.mpr ?_
      exact ⟨lt_succ_of_le hp_le_n, hprime⟩
    have hupper : P.initial.balance p ≤ 0 := by
      have : p > P.n / P.L := by
        have : (p : ℝ) > Real.sqrt P.n := hp'
        have hn_pos : (0 : ℝ) < P.n := by

        exact_mod_cast (lt_of_lt_of_le hp_gt_div (by exact_mod_cast le_rfl))
      exact Params.initial.balance_large_prime_le P this
    have hlower : P.initial.balance p ≥ -(P.n / p) := Params.initial.balance_large_prime_ge P (by
      have : p > P.n / P.L := by
        have hn_pos : (0 : ℝ) < P.n := by

          exact_mod_cast this
        have hL_lt_sqrt : (P.L : ℝ) < Real.sqrt P.n := by
          rw [Real.lt_sqrt (Nat.cast_nonneg _)]

          have : (P.n : ℝ) < Real.sqrt P.n * P.L := by
            have := mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left hL_lt_sqrt (show (0 : ℝ) < Real.sqrt P.n from sqrt_pos.2 hn_pos)

          have := Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.mul_pos P.hL_pos P.hL_pos) P.hL.le
          exact_mod_cast this
        have : (P.n / p : ℝ) < Real.sqrt P.n := by
          have hp_pos : (0 : ℝ) < p := by exact_mod_cast hprime.pos
          have : (P.n : ℝ) / p < Real.sqrt P.n := by
            have hp_ge_sqrt : (p : ℝ) ≥ Real.sqrt P.n := le_of_lt hp_gt_sqrt
            have : (P.n : ℝ) / (Real.sqrt P.n) = Real.sqrt P.n := by

  · simp_all [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum]

by_cases hprime : p.Prime
  · have : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≥ P.n / p - P.M := by
      have hfact : (P.n.factorial).factorization p = P.n / p := by

        nlinarith
      simpa [hfact] using hge
    have hfact : (P.n.factorial).factorization p = P.n / p := by
      simpa using (Params.initial.factorial_factorization_eq_div (n := P.n) (p := p) hprime hp')
    simp only [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, hfact]

  · simp_all [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum]

    have hL_lt_sqrt : (P.L : ℝ) < Real.sqrt P.n := by

  have hbal_ge : P.initial.balance p ≥ -(P.n / p) := Params.initial.balance_large_prime_ge P (p := p) hlarge

      ·

    Params.initial.balance_large_prime_ge P (p := p) (by
      have : p > P.n / P.L := lt_of_lt_of_le hp' (by

by_cases hprime : p.Prime
  · have : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ) ≤ (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum + P.M := by
      have hsum_le : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ) ≤ P.n / p := by

        exact_mod_cast Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Nat.div_lt_succ P.n p)

        by
          calc (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum
              _ ≤ P.M * (Finset.filter (p ∣ ·) (.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n)).card :=
                sum_valuation_le_M_mul_interval_count P hp'
            _ ≤ P.M * ((P.n / P.M + p - 1) / p) := mul_le_mul_left _ <| by
                convert count_multiples_le (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n p hprime.pos using 1

        have : 1 ≤ P.n := Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.pos_of_gt (lt_trans P.hL_pos (lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.mul_pos P.hL_pos P.hL_pos) P.hL.le)))
        exact_mod_cast this
      have hlog : (1 : ℝ) ≤ Real.log P.n := by
        have hn' : (1 : ℝ) < P.n := lt_of_lt_of_le (by norm_num) hn
        have : (0 : ℝ) ≤ Real.log P.n := by
          have : (1 : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := hn
          simpa using Real.log_nonneg this
        nlinarith [this]
      nlinarith [hMpos, hlog]
  have : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast this
  nlinarith

have : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ P.M * Real.log P.n := by
    have h₁ : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ (P.initial.total_imbalance : ℝ) := by
      have hnat : (P.initial.balance p).natAbs ≤ P.initial.total_imbalance := by
        unfold Factorization.total_imbalance
        have := Finset.single_le_sum (fun _ _ ↦ Nat.zero_le _) ?_ ?_
        · simpa [Finset.sum_const_zero] using this
        · intro hmem
          have : p < P.n + 1 := by
            have : (p : ℝ) ≤ Real.sqrt P.n := by exact_mod_cast hp
            have hn : (0 : ℝ) ≤ P.n := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le P.n)
            have : (p : ℝ) < P.n + 1 := lt_of_le_of_lt this (by
              have : (Real.sqrt P.n : ℝ) ≤ P.n := by
                by_cases hP : P.n = 0
                · simp [hP]
                · have hP' : (1 : ℝ) ≤ P.n := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hP))
                  have : Real.sqrt P.n ≤ P.n := by
                    have hn' : (0 : ℝ) ≤ P.n := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le P.n)
                    nlinarith [Real.sqrt_sq_eq_abs (P.n : ℝ), abs_of_nonneg hn', hP']
                  exact this
              nlinarith)
            exact_mod_cast this
          have hp' : p.Prime := by
            by_contra hnp
            exact hmem (by
              simp [Nat.primesBelow, Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_Ico, this, hnp])
          exact hmem (mem_primesBelow.mpr ⟨lt_succ_of_lt this, hp'⟩)
        · exact by
            have : p ∈ (P.n + 1).primesBelow := by
              by_cases hp' : p.Prime
              ·
                have : p < P.n + 1 := by
                  have : (p : ℝ) ≤ Real.sqrt P.n := by exact_mod_cast hp
                  have hn : (0 : ℝ) ≤ P.n := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le P.n)
                  have : (p : ℝ) < P.n + 1 := lt_of_le_of_lt this (by
                    by_cases hP : P.n = 0
                    · simp [hP]
                    · have hP' : (1 : ℝ) ≤ P.n := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hP))
                      have : Real.sqrt P.n ≤ P.n := by
                        have hn' : (0 : ℝ) ≤ P.n := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le P.n)
                        nlinarith [Real.sqrt_sq_eq_abs (P.n : ℝ), abs_of_nonneg hn', hP']
                      nlinarith)
                  exact_mod_cast this
                exact mem_primesBelow.mpr ⟨lt_succ_of_lt this, hp'⟩
              ·
                simp [Nat.primesBelow, Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_Ico, hp'] at *
            simpa [this]
      have hreal : ((P.initial.balance p).natAbs : ℝ) ≤ (P.initial.total_imbalance : ℝ) := by
        exact_mod_cast hnat
      have habs : |(P.initial.balance p : ℝ)| = (P.initial.balance p).natAbs := by
        simpa using (Int.cast_natAbs (P.initial.balance p))
      have : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ |(P.initial.balance p : ℝ)| := le_abs_self _
      linarith [habs, hreal]
    have h₂ : (P.initial.total_imbalance : ℝ) ≤ P.M * Real.log P.n := by
      have : (P.initial.total_imbalance : ℝ) ≤ (P.initial.total_imbalance : ℝ) := le_rfl
      linarith
    linarith
  exact_mod_cast this

have : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ (P.M * Real.log P.n : ℝ) := by
    have : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ (P.M * Real.log P.n : ℝ) := by
      nlinarith
    simpa using this
  exact_mod_cast this

by_cases hprime : p.Prime
  · have hb : P.initial.balance p ≤ P.M := by
      by_cases hp' : (p : ℝ) > Real.sqrt P.n
      · exact Params.initial.balance_medium_prime_le P hp'
      · have : (p : ℝ) = Real.sqrt P.n := by
          have hle : (p : ℝ) ≤ Real.sqrt P.n := hp
          exact le_antisymm hle (le_of_not_gt hp')
        have : False := by
          have hp_pos : (0 : ℝ) < p := by exact_mod_cast hprime.pos
          have hn_pos : (0 : ℝ) < P.n := by
            have := Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.mul_pos P.hL_pos P.hL_pos) P.hL.le
            exact_mod_cast this
          have hsqrt_pos : (0 : ℝ) < Real.sqrt P.n := Real.sqrt_pos.mpr hn_pos
          have : (0 : ℝ) < Real.sqrt P.n := hsqrt_pos
          have : (0 : ℝ) < (p : ℝ) := hp_pos
          exact (lt_irrefl (Real.sqrt P.n)) (this.trans_eq this.symm)
        exact (this.elim)
    have hlog_nonneg : (0 : ℝ) ≤ Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
      have hn_pos : (1 : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := by
        have : 1 ≤ P.n := by
          have := Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.mul_pos P.hL_pos P.hL_pos) P.hL.le
          exact Nat.succ_le_iff.mp this
        exact_mod_cast this
      simpa using Real.log_nonneg hn_pos
    have hM0 : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le P.M)
    have hmul : (P.M : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
      by_cases hM : P.M = 0
      · simp [hM, hlog_nonneg]
      · have hMpos : (0 : ℝ) < (P.M : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hM)
        have hlog_ge1 : (1 : ℝ) ≤ Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by linarith
        nlinarith
    exact le_trans hb (by
      have : (P.M : ℤ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
        exact_mod_cast hmul
      exact this)
  · simp_all [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum]

by_cases hprime : p.Prime
  · have : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≤ P.M * (Nat.log p P.n + 1) := by
      calc
        (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum
            ≤ (P.M * (P.n / p) : ℕ) := by
                have hle : P.initial.a ≤
                    Multiset.join (Multiset.replicate P.M (Multiset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n)) := by
                  unfold Params.initial; aesop
                have hsub :
                    (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≤
                      ((Multiset.join (Multiset.replicate P.M (Multiset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n))).map
                        (·.factorization p)).sum :=
                  Multiset.le_iff_exists_add.mp hle |>.elim fun k hk => by simp [hk]
                refine hsub.trans ?_
                have hbound :
                    ∀ m ∈ Multiset.join (Multiset.replicate P.M (Multiset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n)),
                      m.factorization p ≤ if p ∣ m then m.factorization p else 0 := by
                  intro m hm
                  by_cases hdm : p ∣ m <;> simp [hdm]
                have :
                    ((Multiset.join (Multiset.replicate P.M (Multiset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n))).map
                        (·.factorization p)).sum
                      ≤ ((Multiset.join (Multiset.replicate P.M (Multiset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n))).map
                        (fun m ↦ if p ∣ m then m.factorization p else 0)).sum :=
                  Multiset.sum_map_le_sum_map _ _ hbound
                refine this.trans ?_
                have hpos : 0 < p := hprime.pos
                have hIco :
                    ((Multiset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n).map
                        (fun m ↦ if p ∣ m then m.factorization p else 0)).sum ≤ P.n / p := by
                  classical
                  calc
                    _ ≤ ((Multiset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n).map fun m ↦ if p ∣ m then 1 else 0).sum
                        * (Nat.log p P.n + 1) := by
                          refine Multiset.sum_le_sum fun m hm => ?_
                          by_cases hdm : p ∣ m
                          · have hm_ne : m ≠ 0 := by
                              have : 0 < m := by
                                simp only [Multiset.mem_Ico] at hm
                                exact lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.sub_pos_of_lt (by
                                  have : P.n / P.M ≤ P.n := div_le_self _ _
                                  exact lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.zero_le _) (lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.sub_lt (Nat.le_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_succ_self _) (Nat.le_succ _))) this) (Nat.lt_succ_self _))) (Nat.le_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_mem_Ico hm)) ) (Nat.le_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_mem_Ico hm))
                              exact (Nat.ne_of_gt this)
                            have hm_le_n : m ≤ P.n := by
                              simp only [Multiset.mem_Ico] at hm
                              exact le_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_mem_Ico hm)
                            have : m.factorization p ≤ Nat.log p P.n + 1 := by
                              have : p ^ m.factorization p ≤ m := ordProj_dvd m p
                              have : p ^ m.factorization p ≤ P.n := le_trans this hm_le_n
                              exact Nat.le_log_of_pow_le hprime.one_lt this
                            simp [hdm, this]
                          · simp [hdm]
                    _ ≤ (Multiset.card (Multiset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n) * (Nat.log p P.n + 1)) := by
                          simp [Multiset.sum_map_mul_left, Nat.mul_assoc, Nat.mul_left_comm, Nat.mul_comm]
                    _ ≤ (P.n / p) * (Nat.log p P.n + 1) := by
                          have : (Multiset.card (Multiset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n)) ≤ P.n / p := by
                            classical
                            have := Params.initial.count_multiples_le (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n p hpos
                            simpa [Multiset.Ico, card_filter] using this
                          nlinarith
                simp [Multiset.join, Multiset.sum_join, Multiset.sum_replicate, smul_eq_mul,
                  Multiset.map_replicate, hIco, Nat.mul_assoc, Nat.mul_left_comm, Nat.mul_comm]
            _ ≤ P.M * (Nat.log p P.n + 1) := by
                have hp1 : 1 ≤ p := Nat.succ_le_iff.mp hprime.pos
                have : P.n / p ≤ Nat.log p P.n + 1 := by
                  have hn0 : P.n ≠ 0 := by
                    have : (0 : ℝ) < Real.sqrt (P.n : ℝ) := by
                      have : (0 : ℝ) < (p : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hprime.pos
                      exact lt_of_lt_of_le this (by simpa using hp)
                    exact_mod_cast (ne_of_gt (lt_of_lt_of_le (by positivity) (by simpa using hp)))
                  have hnpos : (0 : ℕ) < P.n := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn0
                  have hp_le_n : p ≤ P.n := by
                    have : (p : ℝ) ≤ Real.sqrt (P.n : ℝ) := by simpa using hp
                    have : (p : ℝ) ^ 2 ≤ P.n := by
                      have := sq_le_sq.mpr (abs_le_abs.mp (by simpa [abs_of_nonneg (show (0:ℝ) ≤ p by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le _))] using this)).2
                      simpa [sq, pow_two] using this
                    exact_mod_cast (le_trans (Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Nat.lt_succ_self _)) (Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Nat.lt_succ_self _)))
                  have : p ^ (P.n / p) ≤ p ^ (Nat.log p P.n + 1) := by
                    exact Nat.pow_le_pow_right (Nat.one_le_iff_ne_zero.mpr hprime.ne_zero) (le_of_lt_succ (Nat.lt_succ_self _))
                  exact le_of_lt_succ (Nat.lt_succ_self _)
                nlinarith
    have hbal :
        (P.initial.balance p : ℤ) ≤ (P.M * (Nat.log p P.n + 1) : ℕ) := by
      unfold Factorization.balance Factorization.sum
      have h1 : (P.initial.a.map (fun m => m.factorization p)).sum ≤ P.M * (Nat.log p P.n + 1) := this
      have h2 : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ) ≥ 0 := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le _)
      exact sub_le_iff_le_add.2 <| by
        exact_mod_cast (le_trans h1 (by nlinarith))
    have hlog : (Nat.log p P.n + 1 : ℝ) ≤ Real.log P.n := by
      have hn1 : (1 : ℝ) ≤ P.n := by
        have : (0 : ℝ) < Real.sqrt (P.n : ℝ) := by
          have : (0 : ℝ) < (p : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hprime.pos
          exact lt_of_lt_of_le this (by simpa using hp)
        have : (0 : ℝ) < (P.n : ℝ) := by
          have := sq_pos_of_pos this
          simpa [sq, pow_two] using this
        exact le_of_lt (lt_of_lt_of_le (by norm_num) (le_of_lt this))
      have hp1 : (1 : ℝ) < p := by exact_mod_cast hprime.one_lt
      have hp_le_sqrt : (p : ℝ) ≤ Real.sqrt (P.n : ℝ) := by simpa using hp
      have hp_le_n : (p : ℝ) ≤ P.n := le_trans hp_le_sqrt (by
        have : (0 : ℝ) ≤ Real.sqrt (P.n : ℝ) := by positivity
        simpa [Real.sqrt_le] using (mul_self_sqrt (Nat.cast_nonneg P.n)))
      have hpow : (p : ℝ) ^ (Nat.log p P.n + 1) ≤ P.n := by
        have : p ^ (Nat.log p P.n + 1) ≤ P.n := Nat.pow_log_le_self p P.n
        exact_mod_cast this
      have : (Nat.log p P.n + 1 : ℝ) * Real.log p ≤ Real.log P.n := by
        have hp_pos : (0 : ℝ) < p := by exact_mod_cast hprime.pos
        have hn_pos : (0 : ℝ) < P.n := by
          have : (0 : ℝ) < (p : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hprime.pos
          exact lt_of_lt_of_le this hp_le_n
        have := Real.log_le_iff_le_exp (by positivity)
        have : Real.log ((p : ℝ) ^ (Nat.log p P.n + 1)) ≤ Real.log P.n := by
          exact Real.log_le_log (by positivity) (by exact_mod_cast Nat.pow_log_le_self p P.n)
        simpa [Real.log_rpow, Real.rpow_nat_cast] using this
      have hp_log_pos : (0 : ℝ) < Real.log p := by
        have : (1 : ℝ) < p := by exact_mod_cast hprime.one_lt
        simpa using Real.log_pos this
      exact (le_div_iff₀ hp_log_pos).2 (by nlinarith)
    have : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * Real.log P.n := by
      have := (Int.cast_le.mpr hbal)
      nlinarith [hlog]
    simpa using this
  · simp [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, hprime]

have : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ P.M * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
    simpa using (le_of_lt (by positivity : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) < P.M * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) + 1))
  exact_mod_cast this

have : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ P.M * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
    by_cases hpos : 0 < P.initial.balance p
    · have : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
        have hn : (1 : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := by
          have hn' : P.n > 0 := lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.mul_pos P.hL_pos P.hL_pos) P.hL.le
          exact one_le_cast.mpr hn'.le
        have hlog : (1 : ℝ) ≤ Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
          have : Real.log (P.n : ℝ) ≥ 0 := Real.log_nonneg hn
          linarith
        nlinarith [hlog]
      have hM : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) := by
        have : P.initial.balance p ≤ P.M := by
          have hp' : (p : ℝ) > Real.sqrt P.n := by
            have : (p : ℝ) ≤ Real.sqrt P.n := by exact_mod_cast hp
            linarith
          exact (P.initial.balance_medium_prime_le (p := p) hp').trans_eq (by rfl)
        exact_mod_cast this
      nlinarith
    · have : P.initial.balance p ≤ 0 := le_of_not_gt hpos
      have : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ 0 := by exact_mod_cast this
      have hn : (1 : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := by
        have hn' : P.n > 0 := lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.mul_pos P.hL_pos P.hL_pos) P.hL.le
        exact one_le_cast.mpr hn'.le
      have hlog : 0 ≤ Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := Real.log_nonneg hn
      have hM : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le _)
      nlinarith
  exact_mod_cast this

have : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ P.M * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
    by_cases hprime : p.Prime
    ·
      -- crude bound: balance ≤ sum of valuations in initial multiset ≤ card * log n
      have hcard : (P.initial.a.card : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := by
        exact_mod_cast P.initial.card
      have hn0 : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le P.n)
      have hlog_nonneg : 0 ≤ Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
        by_cases hn : P.n = 0
        · simp [hn]
        · have hn1 : (1 : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := by
            have : 1 ≤ P.n := Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn)
            exact_mod_cast this
          simpa using Real.log_nonneg hn1
      have hbal_le_sum : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum := by
        simp [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum]
      have hsum_le : ((P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum : ℝ) ≤ (P.initial.a.card : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
        have : ((P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum : ℝ) ≤ (P.initial.a.card : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
          -- each valuation is ≤ log n (very crude)
          have hpoint : ∀ m ∈ P.initial.a, (m.factorization p : ℝ) ≤ Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := fun m hm => by
            have hm_le : m ≤ P.n := P.initial.ha m hm
            have hm_pos : 0 < m := P.initial.hpos m hm
            by_cases hn : P.n = 0
            · subst hn
              have : m = 0 := Nat.eq_zero_of_le_zero hm_le
              exact (hm_pos.ne' this).elim
            ·
              have hn_pos : (0 : ℝ) < (P.n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn)
              have hm_pos' : (0 : ℝ) < (m : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hm_pos
              have hm_le' : (m : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hm_le
              have hmn : (m : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := hm_le'
              have hp1 : (1 : ℝ) < (p : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hprime.one_lt
              have : (m.factorization p : ℝ) ≤ Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
                -- use m ≥ p^{v_p(m)} ⇒ v_p(m) ≤ log_p m ≤ log n (since log_p m ≤ log m / log p)
                have hm0 : m ≠ 0 := hm_pos.ne'
                have hp0 : p ≠ 0 := hprime.ne_zero
                have hpow_dvd : p ^ (m.factorization p) ∣ m := ordProj_dvd m p
                have hpow_le : (p : ℝ) ^ (m.factorization p) ≤ (m : ℝ) := by
                  exact_mod_cast (le_of_dvd (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hm0) hpow_dvd)
                have hpow_lt : (p : ℝ) ^ (m.factorization p) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := hpow_le.trans hmn
                -- take logs
                have hp_pos : (0 : ℝ) < (p : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hprime.pos
                have hlogp_pos : 0 < Real.log (p : ℝ) := Real.log_pos hp1
                have : (m.factorization p : ℝ) * Real.log (p : ℝ) ≤ Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
                  have := Real.log_le_log (by positivity : (0 : ℝ) < (p : ℝ) ^ (m.factorization p)) hn_pos hpow_lt
                  simpa [Real.log_rpow, mul_assoc] using this
                have : (m.factorization p : ℝ) ≤ Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
                  have := (mul_le_mul_right (show 0 < (Real.log (p : ℝ)) from hlogp_pos)).mpr (le_rfl : (m.factorization p : ℝ) ≤ (m.factorization p : ℝ))
                  exact (le_trans (by simpa [mul_assoc] using this) (by
                    simpa [mul_assoc] using this)) -- dummy, replaced below
                -- simplify: use hlogp_pos ≥ 1? avoid; just bound by log n using positivity
                -- since log p ≥ 0, from v*log p ≤ log n we get v ≤ log n / log p ≤ log n (as log p ≥ 1 is false).
                -- fall back to trivial bound using nat_cast: v ≤ m ≤ n, and n ≤ n*log n if log n≥1; too messy.
                -- easiest: use `le_of_lt` with `lt_of_le_of_lt`? keep crude: v ≤ n and n ≤ n*log n if log n≥1.
                have hv_le_n : (m.factorization p : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := by
                  exact_mod_cast (Nat.le_trans (Nat.factorization_le_self m p) hm_le)
                have hn_ge_one : (1 : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := by
                  have : 1 ≤ P.n := Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn)
                  exact_mod_cast this
                have hlogn_ge0 : 0 ≤ Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := Real.log_nonneg hn_ge_one
                have : (m.factorization p : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
                  nlinarith [hv_le_n, hlogn_ge0, hn_ge_one]
                -- then use card ≤ n to get sum ≤ n * (n log n) is too big; but we only need ≤ card * log n.
                -- So instead just show v ≤ log n by bounding v ≤ n and n ≤ log n for n≥1 is false.
                -- This branch is too hard; use trivial inequality by `linarith` with `Real.log (P.n) ≥ 0` and `v ≤ v*log n` if log n ≥ 1.
                -- We'll ensure `Real.log n ≥ 1` by using `n > L^2` etc? not available. Hence avoid.
                -- Therefore, abandon and use final global bound via `simp` and `linarith`:
                exact le_trans (by
                  have : (m.factorization p : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := hv_le_n
                  exact this) (by
                    have : (P.n : ℝ) ≤ Real.log (P.n : ℝ) + (P.n : ℝ) := by linarith
                    linarith)
              exact this
          -- sum ≤ card * log n
          simpa [Factorization.sum, Multiset.sum_map] using
            (Multiset.sum_le_card_nsmul _ _ (Real.log (P.n : ℝ)) (by
              intro m hm; exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le _)) (by
              intro m hm; exact hpoint m hm))
        exact this
      have : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
        have h := (hbal_le_sum.trans hsum_le)
        have := (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right hcard hlog_nonneg)
        nlinarith
      -- now use P.n ≤ P.M * P.n since M≥1? not given. fall back: use `P.M * log n` as upper bound via `linarith` with `P.M ≥ 1`? not given.
      have hMpos : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le P.M)
      have : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
        nlinarith [this, hMpos, hlog_nonneg]
      exact this
    ·
      -- if not prime then balance term from factorial is zero, and sum is nonnegative so balance ≤ sum ≤ M*log n
      have : P.initial.balance p ≤ 0 := by
        simp [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, Nat.factorization_eq_zero_of_not_prime _ hprime]
      have hMpos : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le P.M)
      have hlog : 0 ≤ Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
        by_cases hn : P.n = 0
        · simp [hn]
        ·
          have hn1 : (1 : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := by
            have : 1 ≤ P.n := Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn)
            exact_mod_cast this
          simpa using Real.log_nonneg hn1
      exact le_trans (by exact_mod_cast this) (by nlinarith [hMpos, hlog])
  exact_mod_cast this

have : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ P.M * Real.log P.n := by
    have h : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ (P.M * Real.log P.n : ℝ) := by
      have := le_of_lt (show (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) < (P.M * Real.log P.n : ℝ) + 1 by linarith)
      linarith
    exact h
  exact_mod_cast this

have : P.initial.balance p ≤ P.M := by
    by_cases hpn : (p : ℝ) > Real.sqrt P.n
    · exact (P.initial.balance_medium_prime_le (p := p) hpn).trans <| by
        have hlog_nonneg : 0 ≤ Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
          by_cases hn : P.n = 0
          · simp [hn]
          · have hn2 : (2 : ℕ) ≤ P.n := by
              have : P.L * P.L < P.n := P.hL
              have hL1 : 1 ≤ P.L := Nat.succ_le_iff.mp P.hL_pos
              have : 1 < P.n := lt_of_le_of_lt (by
                simpa [one_mul] using Nat.mul_le_mul hL1 hL1) this
              exact Nat.succ_le_iff.2 this
            have hn1 : (1 : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.succ_le_iff.mp hn2)
            simpa using Real.log_nonneg hn1
        exact_mod_cast (le_mul_of_one_le_right (Nat.cast_nonneg _) (by linarith [hlog_nonneg]))
    · have : ¬ (p : ℝ) > Real.sqrt P.n := hpn
      exact (P.initial.balance_large_prime_le (p := p) (P := P) (by
        have : (p : ℝ) ≤ Real.sqrt P.n := le_of_not_gt hpn
        have : (p : ℕ) ≤ P.n / P.L := by
          have hLpos : (0 : ℝ) < P.L := by exact_mod_cast P.hL_pos
          have hnpos : (0 : ℝ) < P.n := by
            have : 0 < P.L * P.L := Nat.mul_pos P.hL_pos P.hL_pos
            exact_mod_cast lt_of_lt_of_le (by exact this) P.hL.le
          have hsqrt : (Real.sqrt (P.n : ℝ)) < (P.n : ℝ) / P.L := by
            have hL_lt_sqrt : (P.L : ℝ) < Real.sqrt (P.n : ℝ) := by
              have : (P.L : ℝ) ^ 2 < (P.n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast P.hL
              simpa [sq] using (Real.lt_sqrt (Nat.cast_nonneg _) |>.2 this)
            have hnne : (P.n : ℝ) ≠ 0 := (ne_of_gt hnpos)
            have : (Real.sqrt (P.n : ℝ)) * (P.L : ℝ) < (Real.sqrt (P.n : ℝ)) * (Real.sqrt (P.n : ℝ)) := by
              nlinarith [hL_lt_sqrt, Real.sqrt_pos.2 hnne]
            have : (P.L : ℝ) * (Real.sqrt (P.n : ℝ)) < (P.n : ℝ) := by
              simpa [mul_comm, Real.mul_self_sqrt (Nat.cast_nonneg _)] using this
            have : Real.sqrt (P.n : ℝ) < (P.n : ℝ) / P.L := by
              have := (lt_div_iff₀' hLpos).2 (by simpa [mul_comm] using this)
              simpa using this
            exact this
          have : (p : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) / P.L := le_trans this hsqrt.le
          exact_mod_cast this
        exact lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.div_le_self _ _) (lt_of_le_of_lt this (lt_succ_self _)))).trans_le (by nlinarith))
  have hlog_nonneg : 0 ≤ Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
    by_cases hn : P.n = 0
    · simp [hn]
    · have hn2 : (2 : ℕ) ≤ P.n := by
        have : P.L * P.L < P.n := P.hL
        have hL1 : 1 ≤ P.L := Nat.succ_le_iff.mp P.hL_pos
        have : 1 < P.n := lt_of_le_of_lt (by
          simpa [one_mul] using Nat.mul_le_mul hL1 hL1) this
        exact Nat.succ_le_iff.2 this
      have hn1 : (1 : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.succ_le_iff.mp hn2)
      simpa using Real.log_nonneg hn1
  have hMle : (P.M : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
    have h1 : (1 : ℝ) ≤ Real.log (P.n : ℝ) + 1 := by linarith
    have : (P.M : ℝ) * 1 ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * (Real.log (P.n : ℝ) + 1) := by
      exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left h1 (Nat.cast_nonneg _)
    simpa [mul_add, add_mul, one_mul, mul_one] using (le_trans (le_rfl) (by
      have : (P.M : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * (Real.log (P.n : ℝ) + 1) := by
        simpa using this
      exact (le_trans (le_rfl) this)))
  have hMlog : (P.M : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
    have : 1 ≤ Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
      by_cases hn : P.n = 0
      · simp [hn]
      · have hn2 : (2 : ℕ) ≤ P.n := by
          have : P.L * P.L < P.n := P.hL
          have hL1 : 1 ≤ P.L := Nat.succ_le_iff.mp P.hL_pos
          have : 1 < P.n := lt_of_le_of_lt (by
            simpa [one_mul] using Nat.mul_le_mul hL1 hL1) this
          exact Nat.succ_le_iff.2 this
        have hn1 : (2 : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hn2
        have : Real.log (2 : ℝ) ≤ Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := Real.log_le_log (by norm_num) (by linarith)
        have : 1 ≤ Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
          have : (1 : ℝ) ≤ Real.log (2 : ℝ) := by
            norm_num [Real.log_two_gt_d9.le]
          exact le_trans this this
        exact this
    have : (P.M : ℝ) * 1 ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) :=
      mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left this (Nat.cast_nonneg _)
    simpa using this
  exact (show (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) from by exact_mod_cast this) |>.trans hMlog

have : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ P.M * Real.log P.n := by
    nlinarith
  exact_mod_cast this

have : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ (P.M * (Real.log P.n) : ℝ) := by
    have : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * (Real.log P.n) := by
      nlinarith
    simpa [mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using this
  exact_mod_cast this

have : P.initial.balance p ≤ P.M := by
    by_cases hp' : (p : ℝ) > Real.sqrt P.n
    · exact P.initial.balance_medium_prime_le (P := P) (p := p) hp'
    · have hp'' : (p : ℝ) ≤ Real.sqrt P.n := le_of_not_gt hp'
      have hp''' : (p : ℝ) > Real.sqrt P.n := by
        exact lt_of_le_of_ne hp'' (by
          have : (p : ℝ) ≠ Real.sqrt P.n := by
            exact (ne_of_lt (lt_of_le_of_ne hp'' (by aesop))).symm
          exact this)
      exact P.initial.balance_medium_prime_le (P := P) (p := p) hp'''
  have hlog : (Real.log (P.n : ℝ)) ≥ 0 := by
    have hn : (P.n : ℝ) ≥ 1 := by
      have : P.n > 0 := lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.mul_pos P.hL_pos P.hL_pos) P.hL.le
      exact one_le_cast.mpr this
    exact Real.log_nonneg hn
  nlinarith [this, hlog]

have : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ P.M * Real.log P.n := by
    by_cases hprime : p.Prime
    · have hp0 : (0 : ℝ) ≤ p := by positivity
      have hn0 : (0 : ℝ) ≤ P.n := by positivity
      have hbal_int : P.initial.balance p ≤ P.M * (Nat.factorization P.n.factorial p) := by
        simp only [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, sub_le_iff_le_add, add_comm, add_left_comm,
          add_assoc]
        have : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≤ P.M * (Nat.factorization P.n.factorial p) := by
          -- crude bound: each element contributes at most factorial exponent; use card bound
          have hcard : (P.initial.a.card : ℕ) ≤ P.n := P.initial.card P
          have hle_each : ∀ m ∈ P.initial.a, m.factorization p ≤ (P.n.factorial).factorization p := by
            intro m hm
            by_cases hm0 : m = 0
            · simp [hm0]
            · exact Nat.factorization_le_factorization_of_dvd (by
                have : m ∣ P.n.factorial := dvd_factorial (P.hpos m hm).ne' (P.ha m hm)
                exact this) p
          have := Multiset.sum_le_card_nsmul (s := (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)))
            (a := (P.n.factorial).factorization p) (by
              intro x hx
              obtain ⟨m, hm, rfl⟩ := Multiset.mem_map.mp hx
              exact hle_each m hm)
          -- convert nsmul to multiplication by M using card ≤ n ≤ M*n? just weaken to ≤ M * ...
          -- use (card ≤ n) and n ≤ M*n factorial exponent? simplify: bound by M * exponent since M ≥ 1
          have hMpos : 0 < P.M := by
            by_contra hM
            have : P.M = 0 := Nat.eq_zero_of_not_pos hM
            simp [Params.initial, this] at hm
          have hcardM : (P.initial.a.card : ℕ) ≤ P.M * (P.n.factorial).factorization p := by
            -- since exponent ≥ 1 for prime ≤ n, and card ≤ n ≤ M*n
            have hexp_pos : 1 ≤ (P.n.factorial).factorization p := by
              have hp_le_n : p ≤ P.n := by
                have : (p : ℝ) ≤ P.n := by
                  have hn_pos : (0 : ℝ) ≤ P.n := by positivity
                  have hsqrt_le : Real.sqrt (P.n : ℝ) ≤ P.n := by
                    simpa using Real.sqrt_le_self hn_pos
                  exact le_trans hp hsqrt_le
                exact_mod_cast this
              have hp_dvd : p ∣ P.n.factorial := dvd_factorial (Nat.Prime.ne_zero hprime) hp_le_n
              exact hprime.one_le_factorization_of_dvd (factorial_pos P.n).ne' hp_dvd
            have : (P.initial.a.card : ℕ) ≤ P.M * P.n := by
              exact le_trans (by exact_mod_cast hcard) (Nat.le_mul_of_pos_left hMpos)
            exact le_trans this (Nat.mul_le_mul_left _ (Nat.mul_le_mul_left _ (by
              have : P.n ≤ (P.n.factorial).factorization p * P.n := by
                exact Nat.le_mul_of_pos_left (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by
                  have := Nat.one_le_iff_ne_zero.mp hexp_pos
                  exact this))
              exact le_trans (le_of_eq (by ring)) (le_trans (Nat.le_mul_of_pos_left (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by
                have := Nat.one_le_iff_ne_zero.mp hexp_pos
                exact this))) (by simpa [Nat.mul_assoc, Nat.mul_left_comm, Nat.mul_comm] using le_rfl)))))
            )
          -- finish from sum_le_card_nsmul and card bound
          have hsum' : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≤
              P.initial.a.card * (P.n.factorial).factorization p := by
            simpa [nsmul_eq_mul] using this
          have : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≤ P.M * (P.n.factorial).factorization p := by
            exact le_trans hsum' (by
              have : P.initial.a.card ≤ P.M := by
                -- from initial.card and M ≥ 1 and n ≤ M*n etc; just use card ≤ n and n ≤ M*n with n ≥ 1
                have hMpos : 0 < P.M := by
                  by_contra hM
                  have : P.M = 0 := Nat.eq_zero_of_not_pos hM
                  simp [Params.initial, this] at hcard
                have hnle : P.n ≤ P.M * P.n := Nat.le_mul_of_pos_left hMpos
                exact le_trans (P.initial.card P) hnle
              exact Nat.mul_le_mul_right _ this)
          exact this
        omega
      have hlog : (Nat.factorization P.n.factorial p : ℝ) ≤ Real.log P.n := by
        have hn_pos : (1 : ℝ) ≤ P.n := by
          have : (0 : ℕ) < P.n := by
            have := Nat.mul_pos P.hL_pos P.hL_pos
            exact lt_of_lt_of_le this P.hL.le
          exact one_le_cast.mpr this
        have hp_le_n : (p : ℝ) ≤ P.n := by
          have hsqrt_le : Real.sqrt (P.n : ℝ) ≤ P.n := Real.sqrt_le_self (by positivity)
          exact le_trans (by exact_mod_cast hp) hsqrt_le
        have hp_pos : (0 : ℝ) < p := by exact_mod_cast (hprime.pos)
        have : (p : ℝ) ≤ P.n := hp_le_n
        -- very crude: exponent ≤ n and log n ≥ 0, so n ≤ n*log n for n≥3, but avoid: just use nonneg
        have : (Nat.factorization P.n.factorial p : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := by
          exact_mod_cast (Nat.factorization_factorial_le P.n p)
        have hlog_nonneg : 0 ≤ Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := Real.log_nonneg hn_pos
        -- weaken: exponent ≤ n ≤ n*log n when log n ≥ 1; otherwise rhs nonneg and exponent nonneg,
        -- use `le_of_lt`? simplest: bound by `P.n * log P.n` then drop M? but need `log n`.
        -- fallback: just use `le_trans this` with `le_mul_of_one_le_right` to get `≤ n*log n`,
        -- then since `log n ≤ n*log n` for n≥1, but not.
        -- instead use trivial `≤ Real.log P.n` by `simp` if log n is huge? can't.
        -- so just use `by have := le_of_lt (lt_of_le_of_lt this ?_)` not possible.
        -- We'll use `by_cases h : (Real.log (P.n : ℝ)) = 0; simp [h, this]` etc.
        by_cases hlog0 : Real.log (P.n : ℝ) = 0
        · simp [hlog0, Nat.cast_nonneg]
        · have hposlog : 0 < Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := lt_of_le_of_ne hlog_nonneg (Ne.symm hlog0)
          have : (Nat.factorization P.n.factorial p : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
            exact le_trans this (le_mul_of_one_le_right (by exact_mod_cast Nat.zero_le _) (by
              have : (1 : ℝ) ≤ Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
                exact le_of_lt (lt_of_lt_of_le (by linarith) (le_of_lt hposlog))
              exact this))
          -- and `n*log n ≤ log n` is false; so just use the weaker bound to finish later with M*log n
          -- we won't use hlog after all.
          exact le_of_lt (lt_of_le_of_lt (by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le _)) hposlog)
      have hbal_real : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
        have : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * (Nat.factorization P.n.factorial p : ℝ) := by
          exact_mod_cast hbal_int
        -- use `factorization ≤ log n` via a crude `≤ n` and `n ≤ log n` doesn't hold; so just use `le_trans` with `le_of_lt`?? 
        -- simplest: use nonneg of log and bound balance by M*log n since RHS nonneg and balance could be negative.
        have hR : 0 ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
          have hM : 0 ≤ (P.M : ℝ) := by positivity
          have hn_pos : (1 : ℝ) ≤ P.n := by
            have : (0 : ℕ) < P.n := by
              have := Nat.mul_pos P.hL_pos P.hL_pos
              exact lt_of_lt_of_le this P.hL.le
            exact one_le_cast.mpr this
          nlinarith [hM, Real.log_nonneg hn_pos]
        exact le_trans (le_of_lt (lt_of_le_of_lt (by exact_mod_cast (Int.negSucc_le_iff.mp (by decide : (P.initial.balance p) ≥ Int.min))) (by linarith))) (by linarith))
      exact hbal_real
    · have : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ P.M * Real.log P.n := by
        -- if not prime, balance simplifies since factorial factorization is zero
        simp [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, Nat.factorization_eq_zero_of_not_prime _ hprime]
      exact this
  exact_mod_cast this

have hM : (0 : ℤ) ≤ P.M := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le _)
  have hlog : (0 : ℝ) ≤ Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
    by_cases hn : P.n = 0
    · simp [hn]
    · have hn2 : (2 : ℕ) ≤ P.n := by
        have hL2 : 1 < P.L * P.L := by nlinarith [P.hL_pos]
        have hn' : P.L * P.L < P.n := P.hL
        have : 2 ≤ P.L * P.L := Nat.succ_le_iff.mp hL2
        exact le_trans this (Nat.succ_le_iff.mp hn')
      have hn1 : (1 : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.succ_lt_succ (Nat.zero_lt_two)) hn2))
      simpa using Real.log_nonneg hn1
  have hfact_nonneg : (0 : ℤ) ≤ (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ) := by
    exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le _)
  have hsum_nonneg : (0 : ℤ) ≤ ((P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum : ℤ) := by
    exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le _)
  have hbal_le : P.initial.balance p ≤ (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum := by
    simp [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, sub_le_self_iff, hfact_nonneg]
  have hsum_le : ((P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
    have : ((P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) + 0 := by
      linarith
    simpa using this
  have hbal_le' : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
    have : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ ((P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum : ℝ) := by
      exact_mod_cast hbal_le
    exact this.trans hsum_le
  simpa using hbal_le'

have : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ P.M * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
    by_cases hprime : p.Prime
    ·
      have hn_pos : (0 : ℝ) < P.n := by
        have : 0 < P.n := lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.mul_pos P.hL_pos P.hL_pos) P.hL.le
        exact_mod_cast this
      have hle : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ (P.initial.a.card : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
        have hlogp_le : Real.log (p : ℝ) ≤ Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
          have hp_nonneg : (0 : ℝ) ≤ p := by positivity
          have hp_le_n : (p : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := by
            have : (p : ℝ) ≤ Real.sqrt (P.n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hp
            exact this.trans (le_of_eq (Real.sqrt_mul_self hn_pos.le).symm) |> (by
              simpa [pow_two] using (mul_le_mul this this (by positivity) (by positivity)))
          exact Real.log_le_log (by exact_mod_cast hprime.pos) (lt_of_lt_of_le (by positivity) hp_le_n)
        have : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ (P.initial.a.card : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
          unfold Factorization.balance Factorization.sum
          have hsum_nonneg : 0 ≤ (P.initial.a.map (fun m ↦ (m.factorization p : ℤ))).sum := by
            exact Int.ofNat_nonneg _
          have hsum_le : (P.initial.a.map (fun m ↦ (m.factorization p : ℤ))).sum ≤
              (P.initial.a.card : ℤ) * (Int.ofNat (Nat.factorization p p)) := by
            simpa using (Multiset.sum_map_le_sum_map (fun _ ↦ (0:ℤ)) (fun _ ↦ (Int.ofNat 1)) (by
              intro m hm
              have hm_pos := P.initial.hpos m hm
              have hm_le := P.initial.ha m hm
              have : m.factorization p ≤ Nat.log p m := by
                exact le_trans (Nat.factorization_le_log hp_pos.ne') (le_rfl)
              have : (m.factorization p : ℤ) ≤ 1 := by
                have : m.factorization p ≤ 1 := by
                  by_contra h
                  have hge : p ^ 2 ∣ m := by
                    exact dvd_trans (pow_dvd_pow _ (by omega)) (ordProj_dvd _ _)
                  have : (p : ℝ) ^ 2 ≤ m := by
                    exact_mod_cast le_of_dvd (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hm_pos.ne') hge
                  have : (p : ℝ) ^ 2 ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := this.trans (by exact_mod_cast hm_le)

                have : (P.initial.a.map (fun m ↦ (m.factorization p : ℤ))).sum ≤ (P.initial.a.card : ℤ) := by

                  · intro m hm; exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le _)
                  · intro m hm; exact_mod_cast (Nat.factorization_le_one_of_lt_sq ?_ ?_)
                have : (P.initial.a.map (fun m ↦ (m.factorization p : ℤ))).sum -

              classical

by_cases hprime : p.Prime
  · have hsum_nonneg : 0 ≤ (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum := by exact Nat.zero_le _
    have hsum_le : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≤ P.initial.a.card * (Nat.factorization p p) := by

      have hn0 : P.n ≠ 0 := by
        have : (0 : ℕ) < P.n := lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.mul_pos P.hL_pos P.hL_pos) P.hL.le
        exact (Nat.ne_of_gt this)
      have hn_ge1 : (1 : ℝ) ≤ P.n := by

            have : (P.initial.a.card : ℝ) ≤ P.n := hcard
            have : (P.n : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * Real.log P.n := by

have : P.initial.balance p ≤ P.M := by
    by_cases hp' : (p : ℝ) > Real.sqrt P.n

    rcases eq_or_ne P.n 0 with rfl | hn

    · have hn' : (1 : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := by
        exact_mod_cast (Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.pos_iff_ne_zero.mpr hn))
      exact Real.log_nonneg hn'
  have hMle : (P.M : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
    have : (1 : ℝ) ≤ Real.log (P.n : ℝ) + 1 := by linarith [hlog_nonneg]
    nlinarith [this, hM_nonneg]
  exact le_trans (by exact_mod_cast this) hMle

by_cases hprime : p.Prime
  · have hn_pos : (0 : ℝ) < P.n := by
      have : (P.L : ℕ) * P.L > 0 := Nat.mul_pos P.hL_pos P.hL_pos
      have hn : P.n > 0 := lt_of_lt_of_le this P.hL.le
      exact_mod_cast hn
    have hlog_nonneg : 0 ≤ Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
      have : (1 : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := by
        exact one_le_cast.mpr (Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.succ_le_iff.mpr (Nat.pos_of_gt (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.mul_pos P.hL_pos P.hL_pos) P.hL.le))))
      exact Real.log_nonneg this
    have hp_pos : 0 < p := hprime.pos
    have hfactorial_le : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
      have : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := by
        have : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℕ) ≤ P.n := by
          simpa [factorization_def] using factorization_factorial_le P.n p
        exact_mod_cast this
      have h1 : (P.n : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
        have hn1 : (1 : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := by
          exact one_le_cast.mpr (Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.succ_le_iff.mpr (Nat.pos_of_gt (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.mul_pos P.hL_pos P.hL_pos) P.hL.le))))
        have : (1 : ℝ) ≤ Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by

            have : (3 : ℕ) ≤ P.n := by
              have : P.n > 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.mul_pos P.hL_pos P.hL_pos) P.hL.le) (Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.succ_le_iff.mpr (Nat.pos_of_gt (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.mul_pos P.hL_pos P.hL_pos) P.hL.le))))

    have hsum_le : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≤ (P.M : ℕ) * P.n := by
      have hle : P.initial.a ≤ Multiset.join (Multiset.replicate P.M (Multiset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n)) := by
        unfold Params.initial; aesop
      have hval : ∀ m ∈ Multiset.join (Multiset.replicate P.M (Multiset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n)),
          m.factorization p ≤ P.n := fun m hm ↦ (Nat.factorization_le_iff_le_pow.mp (le_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.pos_of_mem_Ico (by
            simpa [Multiset.mem_join, Multiset.mem_replicate] using hm)) (le_of_lt_succ (lt_of_mem_primesBelow (by
              simpa using (mem_primesBelow.mpr ⟨Nat.lt_succ_self _, hprime⟩)))))) (le_of_lt_succ (lt_of_mem_primesBelow (by
            simpa using (mem_primesBelow.mpr ⟨Nat.lt_succ_self _, hprime⟩)))))))

        Multiset.le_iff_exists_add.mp hle |>.elim fun k hk ↦ by simp [hk]
      have := (Multiset.sum_map_le_sum_map (P.initial.a) (Multiset.join (Multiset.replicate P.M (Multiset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n)))
        (fun m ↦ (m.factorization p : ℕ)) (fun m ↦ (P.n : ℕ)) (fun m hm ↦ hval m hm))
      have hsum' : ((Multiset.join (Multiset.replicate P.M (Multiset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n))).map (fun _ ↦ (P.n : ℕ))).sum = P.M * P.n := by
        simp [Multiset.sum_replicate, Multiset.card_Ico, smul_eq_mul, Multiset.join, Multiset.sum_join]
      exact le_trans hsub (by simpa [hsum'] using this)
    have hsum_le' : ((P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * (P.n : ℝ) := by
      exact_mod_cast hsum_le
    have hbalance : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * (P.n : ℝ) := by
      unfold Factorization.balance Factorization.sum
      have : ((P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum : ℝ) - (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℝ) ≤
          ((P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum : ℝ) := by linarith
      exact le_trans (by
        simpa using this) (by simpa [mul_assoc] using hsum_le')
    have hfinal : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
      have : (P.M : ℝ) * (P.n : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
        by_cases hM : P.M = 0
        · simp [hM]
        · have hMpos : (0 : ℝ) < (P.M : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hM
          have : (P.n : ℝ) ≤ Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
            have : (1 : ℝ) ≤ Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
              have hn1 : (1 : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := by
                exact one_le_cast.mpr (Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.succ_le_iff.mpr (Nat.pos_of_gt (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.mul_pos P.hL_pos P.hL_pos) P.hL.le))))
              exact le_trans (by linarith) (Real.log_nonneg hn1)

          nlinarith
      linarith

  · simp [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, hprime]

simp only [Factorization.balance]
  have : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≤ (P.initial.a.card : ℤ) * (Nat.factorization p p) := by
    simpa using (Multiset.sum_map_factorization_le_card_mul_factorization_self (s := P.initial.a) (p := p))
  have hcard : (P.initial.a.card : ℤ) ≤ P.n := by
    exact_mod_cast (P.initial.card)
  have hfact : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ) ≥ 0 := by
    exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le _)
  have hnlog : (0 : ℝ) ≤ Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
    by_cases hn : P.n = 0
    · simp [hn]
    · have hn1 : (1 : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := by
        have : 1 ≤ P.n := Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn)
        exact_mod_cast this
      simpa using Real.log_nonneg hn1
  by_cases hpp : p.Prime
  · have hp_pos : (0 : ℝ) < (p : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hpp.pos
    have hp_le_n : (p : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := by
      have : (p : ℝ) ≤ Real.sqrt (P.n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hp
      exact le_trans this (le_of_eq (Real.sqrt_sq_eq_abs (P.n : ℝ)))
    have hlogp_le_logn : Real.log (p : ℝ) ≤ Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
      have hn_pos : (0 : ℝ) < (P.n : ℝ) := by
        have : 0 < P.n := lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.mul_pos P.hL_pos P.hL_pos) P.hL.le) (le_of_lt P.hL)
        exact_mod_cast this

        have : (p : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := by
          have hp' : (p : ℝ) ≤ Real.sqrt (P.n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hp
          have hn_pos : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le P.n)

    have hbal_le : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
      have hsum_le : ((P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) + (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℝ) := by
        have hsum_nat : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≤ P.M * (Nat.log p P.n + 1) := by
          simpa using (Params.initial.sum_factorization_le_mul_log_add_one (P := P) (p := p) hpp hp)
        exact_mod_cast hsum_nat
      have : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) =
          ((P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum : ℝ) - (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℝ) := by

      linarith
    exact_mod_cast hbal_le

have : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ P.M * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
    by_cases h' : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ P.M * Real.log (P.n : ℝ)
    · exact h'
    · exact (h' (le_rfl)).elim
  exact_mod_cast this

have : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ P.M * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
    have : (P.initial.balance p : ℤ) ≤ ⌈(P.M * Real.log (P.n : ℝ))⌉₊ := by
      have : (P.initial.balance p : ℤ) ≤ Int.ofNat ⌈(P.M * Real.log (P.n : ℝ))⌉₊ := by
        exact le_trans (le_of_eq (by simp)) (le_rfl)
      simpa using this
    have hceil : (⌈(P.M * Real.log (P.n : ℝ))⌉₊ : ℝ) ≤ P.M * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
      exact_mod_cast (Nat.le_ceil _)
    exact le_trans (by exact_mod_cast this) hceil
  exact this

by_cases hprime : p.Prime
  · have : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≤ P.M * (P.n.factorial.factorization p) := by
      have hle : P.initial.a ≤ Multiset.join (Multiset.replicate P.M (Multiset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n)) := by
        unfold Params.initial; aesop
      have hmaple : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)) ≤
          (Multiset.join (Multiset.replicate P.M (Multiset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n))).map (·.factorization p) :=
        Multiset.map_le_map hle _
      have hsumle : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≤
          ((Multiset.join (Multiset.replicate P.M (Multiset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n))).map (·.factorization p)).sum :=
        Multiset.sum_le_sum hmaple
      refine hsumle.trans ?_
      simp only [Multiset.map_join, Multiset.sum_join, Multiset.map_replicate, Multiset.sum_replicate,
        smul_eq_mul]
      apply mul_le_mul_left'
      have hIco_le : ∀ m ∈ (Multiset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n), m.factorization p ≤ (P.n.factorial).factorization p := by
        intro m hm
        have hm_le_n : m ≤ P.n := by
          have : m < P.n := by simpa [Multiset.mem_Ico] using (Multiset.mem_Ico.mp hm).2
          exact le_of_lt this
        have hm_dvd : m ∣ P.n.factorial := Nat.dvd_factorial (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by
          have : 0 < m := by
            have : P.n - P.n / P.M ≤ m := (Multiset.mem_Ico.mp hm).1
            exact lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.sub_pos_of_lt (Nat.div_lt_self (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by
              have : P.M ≠ 0 := by

              exact this)) (by
              have : 1 < P.M ∨ P.M = 1 := Nat.lt_or_eq_of_le (Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.succ_le_succ (Nat.zero_le _))
                ) |> Or.inr
              exact Nat.succ_pos _)) (le_trans (Nat.zero_le _) (le_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_succ_self _) hm_le_n))))
          exact this) hm_le_n

      unfold Factorization.balance Factorization.sum
      have := sub_le_sub_right (show (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≤ P.M * (P.n.factorial.factorization p) from this)
        (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ)
      simpa [Int.ofNat_mul, Int.ofNat_sum] using this
    have hfact_le : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℝ) ≤ Real.log P.n := by
      have hn_pos : (0 : ℝ) < P.n := by
        have : 0 < P.n := lt_trans P.hL_pos (lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.mul_pos P.hL_pos P.hL_pos) P.hL.le)
        exact_mod_cast this
      have hp_pos : (0 : ℝ) < p := by exact_mod_cast hprime.pos
      have hp_le_n : (p : ℝ) ≤ P.n := by
        have : (p : ℝ) ≤ Real.sqrt P.n := hp
        have hs : (Real.sqrt (P.n : ℝ)) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := by
          have hn1 : (1 : ℝ) ≤ P.n := le_of_lt (lt_of_lt_of_le (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) < 1) hn_pos.le)
          simpa using Real.sqrt_le_self hn1
        exact this.trans hs
      have hval_le : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := by
        have : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℕ) ≤ P.n := by
          simpa using Nat.factorization_factorial_le P.n p
        exact_mod_cast this
      exact le_trans hval_le (le_of_lt (by simpa [hn_pos] using Real.log_lt_self hn_pos))
    have : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * Real.log P.n := by
      have hbal' : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℝ) := by
        exact_mod_cast hbal
      nlinarith [hbal', hfact_le]
    exact this
  · simp [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, hprime]

by_cases hprime : p.Prime
  · have : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≤ P.M * (Real.log P.n) + P.n.factorial.factorization p := by
      have hnonneg : 0 ≤ (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum := by exact Nat.zero_le _
      have hpos : 0 ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
        by_cases hn : P.n = 0
        · simp [hn]
        · have hn1 : (1 : ℝ) ≤ (P.n : ℝ) := by
            exact_mod_cast (Nat.succ_le_iff.mpr (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn))
          have : 0 ≤ Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := Real.log_nonneg hn1
          nlinarith
      exact le_trans (by
        have : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≤ (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum := le_rfl
        exact le_trans this (by nlinarith)) (by
          have : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≤ (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum := le_rfl
          nlinarith)
    unfold Factorization.balance Factorization.sum
    have hfac : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ) ≤ P.n.factorial.factorization p := by
      exact le_rfl
    have hsum_nonneg : (0 : ℤ) ≤ (P.initial.a.map (fun m ↦ m.factorization p)).sum := by
      exact Int.ofNat_nonneg _
    have hsum_le : ((P.initial.a.map (fun m ↦ m.factorization p)).sum : ℝ) ≤
        (P.M : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) + (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℝ) := by
      exact_mod_cast this
    have : ((P.initial.a.map (fun m ↦ m.factorization p)).sum : ℤ) -
        (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
      have : ((P.initial.a.map (fun m ↦ m.factorization p)).sum : ℝ) -
          (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℝ) ≤ (P.M : ℝ) * Real.log (P.n : ℝ) := by
        linarith
      exact_mod_cast this
    exact this
  · simp_all [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum]

have : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≤ P.M * Real.log P.n := by
    by_cases hprime : p.Prime
    · have : (P.initial.balance p : ℤ) ≤ (P.M * (Nat.log p P.n) : ℤ) := by
        unfold Factorization.balance Factorization.sum
        have h0 : (0 : ℕ) ∉ P.initial.a := fun h ↦ (P.initial.hpos 0 h).false
        have hs : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≤
            P.M * (∑ k ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (Nat.log p P.n + 1), P.n / p ^ k) := by
          set S := Multiset.join (Multiset.replicate P.M (Multiset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n))
          have hle : P.initial.a ≤ S := by unfold Params.initial; aesop
          have hval : ∀ m ∈ S, m.factorization p ≤ ∑ k ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (Nat.log p P.n + 1), P.n / p ^ k := by
            intro m hm
            have hm_le_n : m ≤ P.n := by
              simp only [S, Multiset.mem_join, Multiset.mem_replicate] at hm
              obtain ⟨_, ⟨_, rfl⟩, hs⟩ := hm
              rw [Multiset.mem_Ico, tsub_le_iff_right] at hs
              exact hs.2.le
            by_cases hm0 : m = 0
            · simp [hm0]
            · have hp0 : p ≠ 0 := hprime.ne_zero
              have hpow0 : ∀ k, p ^ k ≠ 0 := fun k ↦ pow_ne_zero _ hp0
              have hdiv_pos : ∀ k, 0 < k → 0 < p ^ k := fun k hk ↦ pow_pos hprime.pos _
              have hlog_le : m.factorization p ≤ Nat.log p P.n := by
                have : p ^ (m.factorization p) ∣ m := ordProj_dvd _ _
                have hmpos : 0 < m := pos_of_ne_zero hm0
                have : p ^ (m.factorization p) ≤ m := le_of_dvd hmpos this
                have : p ^ (m.factorization p) ≤ P.n := this.trans hm_le_n
                exact Nat.le_log_of_pow_le (by exact_mod_cast hprime.one_lt) this
              have hterm_pos : P.n / p ^ (m.factorization p) ≥ 1 := by
                have hp_pow_dvd : p ^ (m.factorization p) ∣ P.n := by
                  exact dvd_trans (ordProj_dvd _ _) (dvd_trans (dvd_refl m) (dvd_of_le hm_le_n))
                have : p ^ (m.factorization p) ≤ P.n := le_of_dvd (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by
                  exact hpow0 _)) hp_pow_dvd
                exact Nat.one_le_div_iff.mpr (by
                  refine le_trans ?_ (Nat.mul_div_le_self P.n (p ^ (m.factorization p)))
                  exact Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (hpow0 _)))
              have hsum_ge : (∑ k ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (Nat.log p P.n + 1), P.n / p ^ k) ≥
                  P.n / p ^ (m.factorization p) := by
                have hmem : m.factorization p ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (Nat.log p P.n + 1) := by
                  refine Finset.mem_Ico.mpr ?_
                  have : 1 ≤ m.factorization p := by
                    by_cases hfac0 : m.factorization p = 0
                    · simp [hfac0]
                    · exact Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hfac0)
                  exact ⟨this, Nat.lt_succ_iff.mpr hlog_le⟩
                exact le_trans (by
                  simpa [hmem] using (Finset.single_le_sum (fun _ _ ↦ Nat.zero_le _) hmem))
                  (le_of_eq rfl)
              exact le_trans (Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_succ_self _) hsum_ge))
                (Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Nat.lt_succ_self _))
          have hsub : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≤ (S.map (·.factorization p)).sum :=
            Multiset.le_iff_exists_add.mp hle |>.elim fun k hk ↦ by simp [hk]
          have : (S.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≤
              (S.map fun _ ↦ ∑ k ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (Nat.log p P.n + 1), P.n / p ^ k).sum :=
            Multiset.sum_map_le_sum_map _ _ (by intro m hm; exact hval m hm)
          have hconst : (S.map fun _ ↦ ∑ k ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (Nat.log p P.n + 1), P.n / p ^ k).sum =
              P.M * (∑ k ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (Nat.log p P.n + 1), P.n / p ^ k) := by
            simp only [S, map_join, sum_join, map_replicate, Multiset.sum_replicate, smul_eq_mul]
            congr 1
            simp [Multiset.Ico]
          exact (le_trans hsub this) |>.trans_eq hconst
        have hlegendre : (P.n.factorial).factorization p =
            ∑ k ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (Nat.log p P.n + 1), P.n / p ^ k := by
          rw [factorization_def]
          · have := Fact.mk hprime; rw [padicValNat_factorial]; simp
          · exact hprime
        have hb : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum - (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ) ≤
            P.M * (Nat.log p P.n) := by
          have hsum' : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≤
              P.M * (∑ k ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (Nat.log p P.n + 1), P.n / p ^ k) := hs
          have hsum'' : ((P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum : ℤ) ≤
              (P.M * (∑ k ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (Nat.log p P.n + 1), P.n / p ^ k) : ℤ) := by
            exact_mod_cast hsum'
          rw [hlegendre] at hsum''
          have : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum - P.n.factorial.factorization p ≤

          (Real.abs (IC.x₀ 0) * Real.abs (Real.tan (S.ω * t.val))) ^ 2 := by
        -- from hxrel: v₀ = ω*tan*x₀
        have : Real.abs (IC.v₀ 0) = Real.abs (S.ω * Real.tan (S.ω * t.val) * IC.x₀ 0) := by
          simpa [hxrel, mul_assoc] 
        -- simplify
        simp [this, Real.abs_mul, Real.abs_of_nonneg (sq_nonneg _), hω]
        ring
      -- use identity 1 + tan^2 = 1/cos^2
      -- Convert sqrt(abs x₀^2 * (1+tan^2)) = abs x₀ * sqrt(1+tan^2) = abs x₀ / abs cos
      have htrig : √(1 + (Real.tan (S.ω * t.val)) ^ 2) = 1 / Real.abs (Real.cos (S.ω * t.val)) := by
        -- standard lemma in Mathlib
        simpa [Real.one_add_tan_sq, Real.sqrt_inv, sq, Real.abs_mul, hcos] using
          (Real.sqrt_one_add_tan_sq_eq_inv_abs_cos (S.ω * t.val))
      -- finish
      have hxabs : 0 ≤ Real.abs (IC.x₀ 0) := by exact Real.abs_nonneg _
      calc
        √((Real.abs (IC.x₀ 0)) ^ 2 + (Real.abs (IC.v₀ 0) / S.ω) ^ 2)
            = √((Real.abs (IC.x₀ 0)) ^ 2 * (1 + (Real.tan (S.ω * t.val)) ^ 2)) := by
              -- use v relation in squared form
              have hv' : (Real.abs (IC.v₀ 0) / S.ω) ^ 2 =
                  (Real.abs (IC.x₀ 0)) ^ 2 * (Real.tan (S.ω * t.val)) ^ 2 := by
                -- from hxrel
                have : Real.abs (IC.v₀ 0) = Real.abs (S.ω * Real.tan (S.ω * t.val) * IC.x₀ 0) := by
                  simpa [hxrel, mul_assoc] 
                simp [this, Real.abs_mul, pow_two, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, hω]
              ring_nf at hv'
              simp [hv', mul_add, add_mul, pow_two, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm]
        _ = Real.abs (IC.x₀ 0) * √(1 + (Real.tan (S.ω * t.val)) ^ 2) := by
              simp [Real.sqrt_mul (sq_nonneg _)]
        _ = Real.abs (IC.x₀ 0) * (1 / Real.abs (Real.cos (S.ω * t.val))) := by
              simp [htrig]
        _ = Real.abs (IC.x₀ 0) / Real.abs (Real.cos (S.ω * t.val)) := by
              ring
    -- conclude
    rw [hnormtraj, hpos0, hamp]
    simp [Real.abs_div, hcos]
  · intro hn
    -- converse uses conservation of energy (since energy depends on v and x), but easiest:
    -- for 1D oscillator, ‖x‖ reaches amplitude iff velocity is zero; use energy const.
    -- Use energy formula: (m/2)v^2 + (k/2)x^2 = const = (k/2)A^2; equality gives v=0.
    have hE := congrArg (fun (f : Time → ℝ) => f t) (trajectory_energy (S := S) (IC := IC))
    -- rewrite energy at time t
    have hEq :
        1 / 2 * (S.m * ‖∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t‖ ^ 2 + S.k * ‖(IC.trajectory S) t‖ ^ 2) =
          1 / 2 * (S.m * ‖IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 + S.k * ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2) := by
      simpa [HarmonicOscillator.energy, HarmonicOscillator.kineticEnergy,
        HarmonicOscillator.potentialEnergy, real_inner_self_eq_norm_sq] using hE
    -- substitute hn to get v(t)=0
    have hk : (S.k : ℝ) ≠ 0 := by
      -- k = m*ω^2
      have : (S.k : ℝ) = S.m * S.ω ^ 2 := by simpa [ω_sq] using (ω_sq (S := S)).symm
      -- m≠0 and ω≠0
      have hm : (S.m : ℝ) ≠ 0 := by exact S.m_neq_zero
      have hω' : (S.ω : ℝ) ^ 2 ≠ 0 := by nlinarith [hω]
      nlinarith [this, hm, hω']
    have hm : (S.m : ℝ) ≠ 0 := by exact S.m_neq_zero
    -- rearrange
    have : ‖∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t‖ ^ 2 = 0 := by
      -- from equality: m*‖v‖^2 + k*‖x‖^2 = m*‖v0‖^2 + k*‖x0‖^2
      -- and hn gives ‖x‖^2 = ‖x0‖^2 + (‖v0‖/ω)^2, so k*(...) cancels leaving m*‖v‖^2=0
      have hkω : (S.k : ℝ) / (S.ω ^ 2) = S.m := by
        have : (S.k : ℝ) = S.m * S.ω ^ 2 := by
          simpa [ω_sq] using (ω_sq (S := S)).symm
        field_simp [this, hω]
        ring
      have hn2 : ‖(IC.trajectory S) t‖ ^ 2 =
          ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 := by
        have := congrArg (fun r => r ^ 2) hn
        simp [pow_two, mul_assoc] at this
        exact this
      have hEq' : (S.m * ‖∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t‖ ^ 2 + S.k * ‖(IC.trajectory S) t‖ ^ 2) =
          (S.m * ‖IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 + S.k * ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2) := by
        nlinarith [hEq]
      -- substitute hn2
      rw [hn2] at hEq'
      -- use k/ω^2 = m
      have : S.k * (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 = S.m * ‖IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 := by
        field_simp [hkω, hω]
        ring
      nlinarith [hEq', this]
    have : ‖∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t‖ = 0 := by
      simpa using pow_eq_zero_of_le_zero (show (0:ℝ) ≤ ‖∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t‖ from norm_nonneg _ ) this
    -- norm zero implies vector zero
    exact norm_eq_zero.mp this

classical
  have hω : (S.ω : ℝ) ≠ 0 := by exact ω_neq_zero S
  -- shorthand
  let A : Space 1 := IC.x₀
  let B : Space 1 := (1 / S.ω) • IC.v₀
  have htraj : IC.trajectory S t = (Real.cos (S.ω * t.val)) • A + (Real.sin (S.ω * t.val)) • B := by
    simp [InitialConditions.trajectory, A, B, div_eq_mul_inv, mul_smul, smul_smul, mul_assoc,
      mul_left_comm, mul_comm]
  have hvel : (∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S)) t =
      (-S.ω * Real.sin (S.ω * t.val)) • A + (S.ω * Real.cos (S.ω * t.val)) • B := by
    -- rewrite velocity in terms of A,B
    rw [InitialConditions.trajectory_velocity (S := S) (IC := IC)]
    simp [A, B, smul_smul, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, div_eq_mul_inv, neg_smul, mul_smul,
      one_div, inv_mul_eq_iff_eq_mul₀ hω, mul_inv_cancel₀ hω]
  -- reduce to trigonometric identity in a 1D inner product space (‖·‖ comes from inner)
  -- Use the orthogonality relation coming from velocity=0: derivative of ‖x‖^2 is 0 there, and
  -- compute constant amplitude √(‖A‖^2 + ‖B‖^2).
  -- Work with squared norms to avoid square roots.
  have hconst : ‖A‖ ^ 2 + ‖B‖ ^ 2 = ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 := by
    simp [A, B, norm_smul, abs_inv, abs_of_pos (lt_of_le_of_ne (by exact le_of_lt (abs_pos.2 hω)) (by
      intro hn; exact hω (by simpa [abs_eq_zero] using hn)))]
  constructor
  · intro hv0
    have hv0' : (-Real.sin (S.ω * t.val)) • A + (Real.cos (S.ω * t.val)) • B = 0 := by
      have : (S.ω : ℝ) • ((-Real.sin (S.ω * t.val)) • A + (Real.cos (S.ω * t.val)) • B) = 0 := by
        simpa [hvel, smul_add, smul_smul, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using hv0
      -- cancel ω
      exact (smul_eq_zero.mp this).resolve_left hω
    -- show x is scalar multiple of (cos,sin) with amplitude √(‖A‖^2+‖B‖^2)
    have hxnormsq :
        ‖IC.trajectory S t‖ ^ 2 = ‖A‖ ^ 2 + ‖B‖ ^ 2 := by
      -- in 1D, the cross term 2⟪A,B⟫ cancels using hv0'
      -- expand ‖cos A + sin B‖^2 and use ⟪A,B⟫ = 0 from hv0' at this t
      have hab : ⟪A, B⟫_ℝ = 0 := by
        -- take inner with A and B from hv0'
        have hinnerA : ⟪(-Real.sin (S.ω * t.val)) • A + (Real.cos (S.ω * t.val)) • B, A⟫_ℝ = 0 := by
          simpa [hv0'] using congrArg (fun z => ⟪z, A⟫_ℝ) rfl
        have hinnerB : ⟪(-Real.sin (S.ω * t.val)) • A + (Real.cos (S.ω * t.val)) • B, B⟫_ℝ = 0 := by
          simpa [hv0'] using congrArg (fun z => ⟪z, B⟫_ℝ) rfl
        -- solve for ⟪A,B⟫ using the two equations; in 1D they force ⟪A,B⟫=0 unless both A,B=0,
        -- which is excluded by hx.
        -- We avoid case splits by using `hx` to ensure not both A,B are zero.
        have hxAB : A ≠ 0 ∨ B ≠ 0 := by
          rcases hx with hx | hv
          · left; simpa [A] using hx
          · right
            have : IC.v₀ ≠ 0 := hv
            intro hB
            apply this
            -- B = (1/ω) • v₀
            have : (1 / S.ω : ℝ) • IC.v₀ = 0 := by simpa [B] using hB
            exact (smul_eq_zero.mp this).resolve_left (by
              have : (1 / S.ω : ℝ) ≠ 0 := by field_simp [hω]
              exact this)
        -- If sin and cos both nonzero, combine equations; otherwise directly from one equation.
        by_cases hs : Real.sin (S.ω * t.val) = 0
        · -- then cos = ±1, use hinnerA
          have hc : Real.cos (S.ω * t.val) ≠ 0 := by
            have : Real.cos (S.ω * t.val) ^ 2 = 1 := by
              simpa [Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq, hs] using (by rfl : Real.sin (S.ω * t.val) ^ 2 + Real.cos (S.ω * t.val) ^ 2 = 1)
            intro hcz
            have : (0:ℝ) = 1 := by simpa [hcz] using this
            exact zero_ne_one this
          -- from hinnerA: cos * ⟪B,A⟫ = 0
          have : Real.cos (S.ω * t.val) * ⟪B, A⟫_ℝ = 0 := by
            simpa [inner_add_left, inner_smul_left, inner_smul_right, hs, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm,
              mul_comm] using hinnerA
          have : ⟪B, A⟫_ℝ = 0 := by
            exact (mul_eq_zero.mp this).resolve_left hc
          simpa [real_inner_comm] using this
        · -- sin ≠ 0, use hinnerB: -sin*⟪A,B⟫ + cos*‖B‖^2 = 0 and hinnerA
          have : (-Real.sin (S.ω * t.val)) * ‖A‖ ^ 2 + (Real.cos (S.ω * t.val)) * ⟪B, A⟫_ℝ = 0 := by
            simpa [inner_add_left, inner_smul_left, inner_smul_right, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm,
              mul_comm, real_inner_self_eq_norm_sq] using hinnerA
          have : (-Real.sin (S.ω * t.val)) * ⟪A, B⟫_ℝ + (Real.cos (S.ω * t.val)) * ‖B‖ ^ 2 = 0 := by
            simpa [inner_add_left, inner_smul_left, inner_smul_right, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm,
              mul_comm, real_inner_self_eq_norm_sq] using hinnerB
          -- In 1D, ⟪A,B⟫ = ‖A‖*‖B‖*sign, but we avoid: use `hxAB` and trig identity by forcing
          -- both equations to be consistent only if ⟪A,B⟫=0
          -- We can just take the inner of hv0' with (Real.cos • A + Real.sin • B) which equals 0,
          -- giving ⟪B,A⟫=⟪A,B⟫=0.
          have hinnerX :
              ⟪(-Real.sin (S.ω * t.val)) • A + (Real.cos (S.ω * t.val)) • B,
                (Real.cos (S.ω * t.val)) • A + (Real.sin (S.ω * t.val)) • B⟫_ℝ = 0 := by
            simpa [hv0'] using congrArg (fun z =>
              ⟪z, (Real.cos (S.ω * t.val)) • A + (Real.sin (S.ω * t.val)) • B⟫_ℝ) rfl
          -- expand; cross terms cancel leaving ⟪A,B⟫ factor with (cos^2+sin^2)=1
          have : ⟪A, B⟫_ℝ = 0 := by
            -- brute-force simp expansion in 1D
            -- ( -sin*cos*‖A‖^2 - sin^2*⟪A,B⟫ + cos^2*⟪B,A⟫ + cos*sin*‖B‖^2 ) = 0
            -- using ⟪B,A⟫=⟪A,B⟫ and sin ≠ 0, we can isolate ⟪A,B⟫ by choosing not needed;
            -- simp will solve to (cos^2+sin^2)*⟪A,B⟫ = 0
            have : (Real.cos (S.ω * t.val) ^ 2 + Real.sin (S.ω * t.val) ^ 2) * ⟪A, B⟫_ℝ = 0 := by
              simpa [inner_add_left, inner_add_right, inner_smul_left, inner_smul_right,
                real_inner_comm, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, add_mul, mul_add,
                sub_eq_add_neg, pow_two] using hinnerX
            simpa [Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq, one_mul] using this
          exact this
      -- now expand norm squared
      have : ‖(Real.cos (S.ω * t.val)) • A + (Real.sin (S.ω * t.val)) • B‖ ^ 2 =
          ‖A‖ ^ 2 + ‖B‖ ^ 2 := by
        -- use hab and trig identity
        simp [norm_add_sq_real, hab, real_inner_comm, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm,
          pow_two, Real.cos_sq_add_sin_sq, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm, mul_add, add_mul]
      simpa [htraj] using this
    have hxnorm : ‖IC.trajectory S t‖ =
        Real.sqrt (‖A‖ ^ 2 + ‖B‖ ^ 2) := by
      have : 0 ≤ ‖IC.trajectory S t‖ ^ 2 := sq_nonneg _
      have : ‖IC.trajectory S t‖ = Real.sqrt (‖IC.trajectory S t‖ ^ 2) := by
        simpa using (Real.sqrt_sq_eq_abs (‖IC.trajectory S t‖))
      -- rewrite
      simpa [hxnormsq] using (by
        simpa [Real.sqrt_sq_eq_abs, abs_of_nonneg (norm_nonneg _)] )
    -- finalize with desired expression
    have hBnorm : ‖B‖ = ‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω := by
      simp [B, norm_smul, abs_inv, abs_of_pos (lt_of_le_of_ne (by exact le_of_lt (abs_pos.2 hω)) (by
        intro hn; exact hω (by simpa [abs_eq_zero] using hn)))]
    -- use squared form
    have : ‖IC.trajectory S t‖ =
        √(‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2) := by
      -- from hxnorm and hconst/hBnorm
      have : √(‖A‖ ^ 2 + ‖B‖ ^ 2) =
          √(‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2) := by
        simp [A, hBnorm]
      simpa [Real.sqrt_eq_rpow] using congrArg id (by simpa [A, B, hBnorm] using this)
    simpa using this
  · intro hnorm
    -- use derivative of norm squared: if ‖x(t)‖ is maximal (constant amplitude), velocity orthogonal to position in 1D implies v=0
    -- Here, in 1D, if ‖x(t)‖ attains the fixed amplitude √(‖A‖^2+‖B‖^2), then x(t) is ± that amplitude and thus velocity is 0.
    -- Since space is 1D, x and v are colinear; also energy fixed implies v=0 at maximal |x|.
    have hxmax : ‖IC.trajectory S t‖ ^ 2 = ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 := by
      have := congrArg (fun z => z ^ 2) hnorm
      simpa [pow_two, Real.sq_sqrt (by nlinarith [sq_nonneg ‖IC.x₀‖, sq_nonneg (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω)])] using this
    -- use constant energy: E = 1/2(m‖v‖^2 + k‖x‖^2); at maximal ‖x‖, must have ‖v‖=0.
    have hE := congrArg (fun f => f t) (trajectory_energy (S := S) (IC := IC))
    -- simplify energy at t and use hxmax
    have : ‖∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t‖ = 0 := by
      -- from energy formula at time t
      -- Energy(t) = 1/2(m‖v(t)‖^2 + k‖x(t)‖^2) = 1/2(m‖v0‖^2 + k‖x0‖^2)
      -- and ‖x(t)‖^2 = ‖x0‖^2 + (‖v0‖/ω)^2, with k = m*ω^2, implies ‖v(t)‖=0.
      -- Use ω_sq lemma: ω^2 = k/m.
      have hm : (S.m : ℝ) ≠ 0 := by
        -- derived from ω_neq_zero and ω_sq : ω^2 = k/m (so m≠0)
        -- avoid heavy reasoning: Mathlib has `S.m_neq_zero`? not available; use field_simp with ω_sq
        have : (S.k / S.m : ℝ) ≠ 0 := by
          simpa [ω_sq] using (sq_ne_zero_iff.mp (show (S.ω : ℝ) ^ 2 ≠ 0 from sq_ne_zero.2 hω))
        exact (div_ne_zero_iff.mp this).2
      -- compute using hE
      -- We only need to show norm is zero, so use `mul_eq_zero` after simplification.
      have hE' : S.energy (IC.trajectory S) t =
          1 / 2 * (S.m * ‖IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 + S.k * ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2) := by
        simpa using hE
      -- unfold energy at t
      simp [HarmonicOscillator.energy, HarmonicOscillator.kineticEnergy,
        HarmonicOscillator.potentialEnergy] at hE'
      -- extract v term
      -- after simplification, isolate ‖∂ₜ x t‖^2 = 0
      have : S.m * ‖∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t‖ ^ 2 + S.k * ‖IC.trajectory S t‖ ^ 2 =
          S.m * ‖IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 + S.k * ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 := by
        nlinarith [hE']
      -- substitute hxmax and ω_sq to eliminate initial velocity term
      have hk : (S.k : ℝ) = S.m * S.ω ^ 2 := by
        -- from ω_sq : ω^2 = k/m
        have := congrArg (fun z => z * S.m) (ω_sq (S := S))
        -- ω^2 * m = k
        -- rearrange
        field_simp [hm] at this
        nlinarith [this]
      -- Now: m‖v(t)‖^2 + k‖x(t)‖^2 = m‖v0‖^2 + k‖x0‖^2
      -- and ‖x(t)‖^2 = ‖x0‖^2 + (‖v0‖/ω)^2 implies k(‖x(t)‖^2-‖x0‖^2)=m‖v0‖^2
      -- so m‖v(t)‖^2 = 0
      have : S.m * ‖∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t‖ ^ 2 = 0 := by
        -- manipulate
        have hxmax' : ‖IC.trajectory S t‖ ^ 2 =
            ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ ^ 2) / (S.ω ^ 2) := by
          -- (‖v0‖/ω)^2 = ‖v0‖^2 / ω^2
          have : (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 = ‖IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 / (S.ω ^ 2) := by
            field_simp [pow_two, hω]
            ring
          simpa [this] using hxmax
        -- use hk and ω relation
        have : S.m * ‖∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t‖ ^ 2 =
            S.m * ‖IC.v₀‖ ^ 2 + S.k * ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 - S.k * ‖IC.trajectory S t‖ ^ 2 := by
          nlinarith [this]
        -- replace ‖x(t)‖^2
        rw [this, hxmax']
        -- turn S.k into S.m*ω^2
        rw [hk]
        field_simp [pow_two, hω]
        ring
      exact norm_eq_zero.1 (pow_eq_zero_of_le_zero (by exact sq_nonneg _) (by
        have : ‖∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t‖ ^ 2 = 0 := by
          exact (mul_eq_zero.mp this).resolve_left hm
        simpa [pow_two] using this))
    simpa [this] using this

classical
  constructor
  · intro h
    simp [trajectory_eq] at h ⊢
    by_cases hcos : Real.cos (S.ω * t.val) = 0
    · have hsin : Real.sin (S.ω * t.val) = 0 := by
        have := congrArg (fun z => z + (S.ω * Real.sin (S.ω * t.val)) • IC.x₀) h
        simp [trajectory_velocity, hcos] at this
        simpa using this
      simp [hcos, hsin, hx] at *
    ·
      have htan : Real.tan (S.ω * t) = IC.v₀ 0 / (S.ω * IC.x₀ 0) :=
        tan_time_eq_of_trajectory_velocity_eq_zero (S := S) (IC := IC) (t := t) h hx
      have : ‖IC.x₀‖ = ‖IC.x₀‖ := rfl
      simp [trajectory, htan, hcos, hx] at *
  · intro h
    have : True := trivial
    simp [trajectory_velocity] at *
    simpa [trajectory_velocity] using (show ∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t = 0 from by
      simp [trajectory_velocity])

classical
  simpa using (Iff.intro (fun h => by
    have : False := by
      have hω : S.ω ≠ 0 := ω_neq_zero S
      exact (hx.elim (fun hx0 => hx0) (fun hv0 => hv0)) (by
        cases hx with
        | inl hx0 => simpa using hx0
        | inr hv0 => simpa using hv0)
    exact False.elim this) (fun h => by
    have : False := by
      have hω : S.ω ≠ 0 := ω_neq_zero S
      exact (hx.elim (fun hx0 => hx0) (fun hv0 => hv0)) (by
        cases hx with
        | inl hx0 => simpa using hx0
        | inr hv0 => simpa using hv0)
    exact False.elim this))

classical
  simpa using (Iff.intro (fun h => by
    exfalso
    exact False.elim (by
      have : True := trivial
      exact (False.elim (by
        have : False := by
          cases hx with
          | inl hx0 =>
              exact hx0 (by
                simpa using (by
                  have : (0 : Space 1) = 0 := rfl
                  exact this))
          | inr hv0 =>
              exact hv0 (by
                simpa using (by
                  have : (0 : Space 1) = 0 := rfl
                  exact this))
        exact this))))
    )
    (fun h => by
      exfalso
      exact False.elim (by
        have : True := trivial
        exact (False.elim (by
          have : False := by
            cases hx with
            | inl hx0 =>
                exact hx0 (by
                  simpa using (by
                    have : (0 : Space 1) = 0 := rfl
                    exact this))
            | inr hv0 =>
                exact hv0 (by
                  simpa using (by
                    have : (0 : Space 1) = 0 := rfl
                    exact this))
          exact this)))))

constructor
  · intro h
    have hω : S.ω ≠ 0 := ω_neq_zero S
    have ht : tan (S.ω * t) = IC.v₀ 0 / (S.ω * IC.x₀ 0) :=
      tan_time_eq_of_trajectory_velocity_eq_zero (S := S) (IC := IC) t h hx
    have hx0 : IC.x₀ 0 ≠ 0 := by
      intro hn
      have : IC.x₀ = 0 := by

ι : Type u_1
inst✝ : UnitalFreeStateTheory ι
i : ι
ρ : MState (H i)
ε : Prob
hε : 0 < ε ∧ ε < 1
σ : (n : ℕ) → ↑IsFree
ε' : Prob
hε'₁ : 0 < ε'
hε'₂ : ε' < ε
hR1R2 : @SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε < @SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ
hR1 : @SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε ≠ ⊤
hR2 : @SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ ≠ ⊤
ε₀ : ℝ := (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ - @SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε).toReal * (↑ε - ↑ε') / (1 - ↑ε)
hε₀ : 0 < ε₀
hε₀' : ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε) ≤ ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ε₀
m : ℕ
hm : m ≥ 1 ∧ 𝐃(statePow ρ m‖↑(σ m)) / ↑m < @SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ + ↑⟨ε₀, ⋯⟩
σ₁ : MState (H i)
hσ₁_pos : σ₁.m.PosDef
hσ₁_free : IsFree σ₁
«σ̃» : (n : ℕ) → MState (H (i ^ n)) := fun n => @SteinsLemma.Lemma6_σn ι inst✝ i m σ₁ (↑(σ m)) n
σ_max_exists : ∀ (n : ℕ), ∃ x ∈ IsFree, IsMaxOn (fun σ => OptimalHypothesisRate (statePow ρ n) ε {σ}) IsFree x
«σ⋆» : (n : ℕ) → MState (H (i ^ n)) := fun n => Classical.choose ⋯
σ' : (n : ℕ) → MState (H (i ^ n)) := fun n => ⟨2 / 3, ⋯⟩[⟨1 / 2, ⋯⟩[«σ̃» n↔«σ⋆» n]↔statePow σ₁ n]
σ'_free : ∀ (n : ℕ), IsFree (σ' n)

mineig : ℝ := ⨅ i_1, ⋯.eigenvalues i_1

c : ℕ → ℝ := fun n => Real.log (1 / mineig) + Real.log 3 / ↑(max n 1)

f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ := fun n lam => ↑⌈Real.log lam / c n⌉ * c n

h_exp_f : ∀ (n : ℕ) (x : ℝ), 0 < x → x ≤ Real.exp (f n x) ∧ Real.exp (f n x) < Real.exp (c n) * x

σ''_le_σ' : ∀ (n : ℕ), ↑(σ'' n) ≤ Real.exp (c n) • ↑(σ' n)

debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
inst✝ : UnitalFreeStateTheory ι
i : ι
ρ : MState (H i)
ε : Prob
hε : 0 < ε ∧ ε < 1
σ : (n : ℕ) → ↑IsFree
ε' : Prob
hε'₁ : 0 < ε'
hε'₂ : ε' < ε
hR1R2 : @SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε < @SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ
hR1 : @SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε ≠ ⊤
hR2 : @SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ ≠ ⊤
ε₀ : ℝ := (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ - @SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε).toReal * (↑ε - ↑ε') / (1 - ↑ε)
hε₀ : 0 < ε₀
hε₀' : ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε) ≤ ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ε₀
m : ℕ
hm : m ≥ 1 ∧ 𝐃(statePow ρ m‖↑(σ m)) / ↑m < @SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ + ↑⟨ε₀, ⋯⟩
σ₁ : MState (H i)
hσ₁_pos : σ₁.m.PosDef
hσ₁_free : IsFree σ₁
«σ̃» : (n : ℕ) → MState (H (i ^ n)) := fun n => @SteinsLemma.Lemma6_σn ι inst✝ i m σ₁ (↑(σ m)) n
σ_max_exists : ∀ (n : ℕ), ∃ x ∈ IsFree, IsMaxOn (fun σ => OptimalHypothesisRate (statePow ρ n) ε {σ}) IsFree x
«σ⋆» : (n : ℕ) → MState (H (i ^ n)) := fun n => Classical.choose ⋯
σ' : (n : ℕ) → MState (H (i ^ n)) := fun n => ⟨2 / 3, ⋯⟩[⟨1 / 2, ⋯⟩[«σ̃» n↔«σ⋆» n]↔statePow σ₁ n]
σ'_free : ∀ (n : ℕ), IsFree (σ' n)
σ'_posdef : ∀ (n : ℕ), (σ' n).m.PosDef
mineig : ℝ := ⨅ i_1, ⋯.eigenvalues i_1
h_min_pos : 0 < mineig

h_f_le : ∀ (n : ℕ) (lam : ℝ), f n lam < Real.log lam + c n

σ''_le_σ' : ∀ (n : ℕ), ↑(σ'' n) ≤ Real.exp (c n) • ↑(σ' n)
ℰ : (n : ℕ) → CPTPMap (H (i ^ n)) (H (i ^ n)) ℂ := fun n => pinching_map (σ'' n)
